comments.author: @renatezaphiriou8838
comments.text:
Thank you very much for this wonderful video about Wales, a land of legends and myths, full of mysticism and with a rich history! 
You’ve captured the essence of this enchanting country perfectly!
A long time ago, I was a member of a German choir, and we were twinned with a Welsh male voice choir. This led to us visiting Cardiff, and in return, these outstanding singers gave a guest performance in Stuttgart (Germany). 
It was a long time ago, but this marvellous video has brought back so many lovely memories – thank you once again from the bottom of my heart! 🙏🙏🙏👍👍💚💚

replies.author: @trueglobe66
replies.text: Thank you for sharing such a meaningful memory! The connection between your German choir and the Welsh male voice choir sounds truly special, especially with the visits to Cardiff and Stuttgart. Was there a particular Welsh song, performance, or moment from that exchange that has stayed with you all these years?

comments.author: @trueunrealglobe
comments.text: I honestly didn't expect to enjoy this documentary so much. Every location felt unique, and I ended up searching several of these places after finishing the video.

replies.author: @trueglobe66
replies.text: We’re so glad you enjoyed discovering the hidden corners of Wales with us—thanks for watching! 😊⛰️
